operations.name: Signup
operations.purpose: Register a new account. The role parameter determines which credential map (C, P, or M) is updated.
stateVariables: R ∈ {C, P, M} depending on role
operations.precondition: The username u must not already exist in the target role map R.
operations.postcondition: The credential map R now contains an entry mapping u to hashed password p.

operations.name: Login
operations.purpose: Authenticate a user and issue a session token.
operations.precondition: The password p must match the stored credential for u, AND u must not already have an active session token.
operations.postcondition: A new token is issued and recorded in T, mapping token to username u.

operations.name: Logout
operations.purpose: Invalidate the current session token.
operations.precondition: The token must exist in the active session map T.
operations.postcondition: The token is removed from T; the session is invalidated.

sections.description: A newly registered plumber must complete a 6-step onboarding wizard before entering the qualification pipeline. Each step advances the plumber state from STEP_k to STEP_k+1. After Step 6, state becomes ONBOARD_DONE.

operations.name: Submit Onboarding Step k (k = 1..6)
operations.purpose: Submit data for step k of the onboarding wizard. Advances plumber state to next step.
operations.precondition: The plumber's current onboarding state must be exactly STEP_k, and the session token must be active.
operations.postcondition: The plumber's state advances to STEP_k+1. After Step 6, state becomes ONBOARD_DONE.

sections.description: After onboarding is complete, plumbers enter the HR qualification pipeline. Managers drive this pipeline through site visits, training, and final activation decisions.

operations.name: Initial Qualification Application
operations.purpose: Submit qualification application with supporting documents. Moves plumber into examination state.
operations.precondition: Plumber qualification state must be Q_INIT (not yet applied).
operations.postcondition: Qualification state advances to UNDER_EXAM.

operations.name: Semi-Qualify (Send to Training)
operations.purpose: After site visit, manager determines plumber needs training before full activation.
operations.precondition: Plumber must be in UNDER_EXAM state.
operations.postcondition: Qualification state advances to TRAINING.

operations.name: Fully Qualify (Activate)
operations.purpose: Manager activates plumber after successful examination.
operations.precondition: Plumber must be in UNDER_EXAM state.
operations.postcondition: Qualification state becomes ACTIVE.

operations.name: Disqualify (Reject)
operations.purpose: Manager rejects plumber after failed examination.
operations.precondition: Plumber must be in UNDER_EXAM state.
operations.postcondition: Qualification state becomes REJECTED.

operations.name: Suspend Plumber
operations.purpose: Temporarily suspend an active plumber.
operations.precondition: Plumber must currently be ACTIVE.
operations.postcondition: Qualification state becomes SUSPENDED.

operations.name: Reinstate Plumber
operations.purpose: Reinstate a previously suspended plumber to active status.
operations.precondition: Plumber must currently be SUSPENDED.
operations.postcondition: Qualification state returns to ACTIVE.

operations.name: Delete Plumber Account
operations.purpose: Permanently remove a plumber from the system.
operations.precondition: The plumber must exist in the qualification map.
operations.postcondition: The plumber is removed from Qual and P.

sections.description: The complaint lifecycle is the core business process of ConDoIt. A complaint transitions through the following states: RAISED → ASSIGNED → UNDER_EXAM_C → QUOTATION_RAISED → UNDER_EXEC → PAYMENT_PENDING → DONE (or ABANDONED or back to RAISED)

operations.name: Raise Complaint
operations.purpose: Customer submits a new service complaint or request.
operations.precondition: The customer must be authenticated and in CUSTOMER_IDLE state.
operations.postcondition: A new ComplaintRecord is created with state RAISED and added to Compl.

operations.name: Assign Plumber to Complaint
operations.purpose: Manager assigns an active, available plumber to an open complaint.
operations.precondition: The complaint must be in RAISED state. The plumber must be ACTIVE in the qualification map.
operations.postcondition: The complaint's plumber field is set to plumberId and state advances to ASSIGNED.

operations.name: Plumber Accepts Assignment
operations.purpose: Assigned plumber accepts the complaint and proceeds to site examination.
operations.precondition: The complaint must be in ASSIGNED state, and the calling plumber must be the one assigned.
operations.postcondition: Complaint state advances to UNDER_EXAM_C.

operations.name: Plumber Rejects Assignment
operations.purpose: Assigned plumber rejects the complaint. Complaint returns to RAISED for reassignment.
operations.precondition: The complaint must be in ASSIGNED state, and the calling plumber must be the one assigned.
operations.postcondition: Complaint state reverts to RAISED; plumber field is cleared.

operations.name: Raise Quotation
operations.purpose: Plumber submits a cost quotation for the work required. Complaint awaits customer approval.
operations.precondition: The complaint must be in UNDER_EXAM_C state.
operations.postcondition: The complaint's quotation field is set to items, and state advances to QUOTATION_RAISED.

operations.name: Approve Quotation
operations.purpose: Customer approves the quotation. Work is authorised to begin.
operations.precondition: The complaint must be in QUOTATION_RAISED state.
operations.postcondition: Complaint state advances to UNDER_EXEC.

operations.name: Reject Quotation / Abandon
operations.purpose: Customer rejects the quotation. Complaint is permanently abandoned.
operations.precondition: The complaint must be in QUOTATION_RAISED state.
operations.postcondition: Complaint state becomes ABANDONED — a terminal state.

operations.name: Mark Task Completed
operations.purpose: Plumber marks work as done and submits a completion report. Triggers payment flow.
operations.precondition: The complaint must be in UNDER_EXEC state.
operations.postcondition: Complaint state advances to PAYMENT_PENDING.

operations.name: Make Payment
operations.purpose: Customer makes payment. Complaint lifecycle reaches terminal DONE state.
operations.precondition: The complaint must be in PAYMENT_PENDING state.
operations.postcondition: Complaint state becomes DONE — primary terminal state.

operations.name: Submit Feedback
operations.purpose: Customer submits a star rating and text feedback after complaint resolution.
operations.precondition: The complaint must be in DONE state.
operations.postcondition: Feedback is recorded. Complaint state remains DONE — unchanged.
